name: io.github.yksanjo/gmem
description: Persistent project memory MCP server for Solana AI agents — schema-typed entities for Programs, Accounts/PDAs (with seeds), Instructions, architectural Decisions, audit Findings, and Integrations. Anchor workspace + Solana CLI auto-ingest, SQLite + FTS5 BM25 ranking, append-only versioning, git-aware diffs.

environmentVariables.description: Override the auto-resolved memory database path. Defaults to ~/.gmem/<projectHash>/memory.db, with one db file per Solana project (project root resolved from Anchor.toml or workspace Cargo.toml).
environmentVariables.name: GMEM_DB
